---
name: Feature request
about: Capture an idea that may become a spec
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["backlog"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem or opportunity

What should change, and why does it matter?

## Desired outcome

What should be true when this is done?

## Proposed scope

Describe the smallest useful version of the change.

## Constraints

List any deadlines, dependencies, compliance concerns, or technical limits.

## Related context

Link research, prior specs, examples, screenshots, or supporting issues.

## Questions for the spec

What still needs to be decided before implementation can start?
